testcase.name: test_heatmap_returns_200
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration28_visualizations.py:54: in test_heatmap_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid authentication credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_heatmap_returns_array

failure.message: AssertionError: Heatmap should return an array assert False + where False = isinstance({'detail': 'Invalid authentication credentials'}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration28_visualizations.py:60: in test_heatmap_returns_array assert isinstance(data, list), "Heatmap should return an array" E AssertionError: Heatmap should return an array E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'detail': 'Invalid authentication credentials'}, list)

failure.message: KeyError: 0

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration28_visualizations.py:67: in test_heatmap_data_structure item = data[0] ^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 0
